issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal method cause logic to be unreachable or incorrect.
compute_signal does not use 'as_of' date to filter or align data, potentially causing incorrect signal timing.
position attribute usage is unclear; no initialization shown, may cause errors.
In compute_signal, exit condition checks days_held using df date instead of as_of; inconsistent date handling.
target_allocations returns empty dict on RISK_OFF (SELL) signal, but spec expects SELL action (no allocation is acceptable).
Overall logic matches spec intent but code style and indentation errors prevent correct execution.
